name: Stale Deal Alert
description: Notifies the assigned rep when a deal has no activity for 7 days. Escalates to manager after 14 days.
descriptionAr: ينبّه المندوب المسؤول عند عدم وجود نشاط على صفقة لمدة ٧ أيام. يصعّد للمدير بعد ١٤ يومًا.

config.title: Stale deal: {{title}}
config.body: No activity for 7+ days on deal {{title}} ({{value}} {{currency}}). Please follow up.
